response.justification: Bogdan brings strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools, with direct alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His open-source contributions, testing focus, and cross-language proficiency (including Java/Kotlin) are major assets. Concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL, and his German language skill is basic, though not critical for an English-speaking engineering team.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS, Docker)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, matching a key requirement
Strong testing culture and open-source contributions (Vitest-like tools, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks are used
Limited detail on relational database experience (PostgreSQL/MySQL) vs. heavy MongoDB focus
German language skill is basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based team
